entry: Log entry: Our champion mr_d1_t1_s6 is holding strong at 85/100 survivability, and we won 58% of the last 24h of closed trades. No overclaiming, no faked wins — just one more truthful day of measurement.
good_signals: our champion MR_d1_t1_s6 is holding strong at 85/100 survivability
we won 58% of the last 24h of closed trades

what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
